member.name: P:GTA.Math.Matrix.Item(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets the component at the specified index.
member.value: The value of the matrix component, depending on the index.
member.param: The row of the matrix to access.
The column of the matrix to access.
member.returns: The value of the component at the specified index.
member.exception:
Thrown when the
or
is out of the range [0, 3].
